lenses.title: Best for Aura of Intelligence
lenses.blurb: Human-centred, privacy-first personal AI, cognitive architecture and personal digital twins.

lenses.title: Best civic and community-technology
lenses.blurb: Decentralised municipal AI, digital noticeboards, participatory governance and public information.

lenses.title: Best health, longevity and dementia
lenses.blurb: Ageing, dementia support, preventative and measured health, hyperbaric and self-development research.

lenses.title: Best creative and immersive-media
lenses.blurb: Immersive storytelling, the Infinity Engine music-visuals pipeline, cultural archives and festivals.

lenses.title: Best for G.A.J.R.A. Earth or a nonprofit
lenses.blurb: Mission-driven, regenerative and social-enterprise work aligned to the SDGs.

lenses.title: Could fund an on-island Minjerribah pilot
lenses.blurb: Programs that could support a pilot or research facility on North Stradbroke Island / Minjerribah through a community-led, culturally appropriate vehicle.
